name: No Cook Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the confectioners' sugar, cocoa powder, eggs, milk, and vanilla extract until well combined.
2. Stir in the melted butter and peanut butter until evenly incorporated.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased pan, spreading it out evenly.
4. Refrigerate the fudge until it is well set.
